options_option_autoLockException_label.description: Label preceding input for adding whitelist exception
options_option_autoLockException_label.message: Permet que la closació automàtica de les pestanyes de llista blanca amb URL que continguin:

options_option_autoLockException_add.description: Button label for adding a whitelist exception

options_option_autoLockException_example.description: Example describing how whitelist exceptions work using minimatch patterns. See https://github.com/isaacs/minimatch for details.
options_option_autoLockException_example.message: Example: "cnn.com/sports" would match the page "https://www.cnn.com/sports" and any URL containing "cnn.com/sports".

options_option_autoLockException_empty.description: Message shown when there are no whitelist exceptions
options_option_autoLockException_empty.message: Encara no hi ha excepcions de llista blanca. Utilitzeu el formulari anterior per afegir -ne alguns.

tabLock_lockedReason_whitelisted.description: Label for a tab locked because it matches the whitelist
